query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN foto_antes_url IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_foto_antes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN foto_despues_url IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_foto_despues,
  SUM(CASE WHEN foto_antes_marcada_url IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_foto_marcada
FROM items;
